name: Topical DNA repair enzymes
summary: Topical skin products containing DNA repair enzymes, sometimes combined with sunscreen, tracked for small human actinic-keratosis and UV-damage biomarker studies.
mechanism_summary: Applies DNA repair enzyme-containing topical formulations to reduce UV-induced DNA damage markers and premalignant skin-field burden in localized dermatologic contexts.

open_questions: Whether localized skin biomarker changes translate into durable clinical prevention
Whether effects depend on sunscreen co-intervention or specific enzyme formulation
Whether the evidence has any relevance beyond dermatologic UV-damage contexts
